name: Nopales Guisados (Sauteed Cactus)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound cactus leaves, dethorned, cut into 1/4 inch strips
1 small onion, cut into thin strips
1 dried red New Mexico chile or similar, seeded
and soaked in hot water until soft
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook nopales in boiling salted water until their color changes to dark green and they are soft.
2. When done, rinse well to remove the sliminess (similar to okra).
3. In a skillet, fry onions with a little oil until transparent.
4. Add the nopales and salt to taste; sauté to blend flavors.
5. While sauteing, puree the chile and some of the soaking water in a blender.
6. Add this puree to the nopales and stir to blend.
7. Stir in cilantro just before serving.
8. Serve on a platter with Tortas de Camaron on top.
